Use this data source to query ECS floating IPs.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_floating_ips" "example" {
  floating_ip_id = edgenext_ecs_floating_ip.example.id
  limit          = 10
}

resource "edgenext_ecs_floating_ip" "example" {
  bandwidth = 10
}
```

Argument Reference

* `floating_ip_id` - (Optional) Floating IP ID filter.
* `floating_ip_address` - (Optional) Floating IP address filter.
* `limit` - (Optional) Maximum number of results, default `10`.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `total` - Matched floating IP count.
* `floating_ips` - Floating IP list. Common fields include `id`, `floating_ip_address`, `network_interface_id`, `network_interface_name`, `fixed_ip_address`, `status`, and `project_id`.
